notes: Fixture-only inventory for public PP&D discovery planning.
Records contain canonical public URLs and crawl hints only; no response bodies, downloaded documents, browser traces, screenshots, credentials, or private DevHub session paths are present.
Authority labels identify the public source owner or portal role to support later provenance validation.

recrawlCadenceHints.daily: High-change operational guidance such as DevHub FAQ, payment, outage, or current process pages.
recrawlCadenceHints.weekly: Permit application and guide pages where workflow text may change but is not expected to change daily.
recrawlCadenceHints.monthly: Stable forms, handouts, and PDF index pages unless linked source-index hashes change sooner.
recrawlCadenceHints.on_source_index_change: Recrawl when a parent source-index record has a changed content hash, redirect, modified-date evidence, or link inventory change.
